title: citrus × nobilis subf. keraji
intro: Citrus × nobilis subf. keraji, also known as Meyer lemon, is a cross between a lemon and an orange, characterized by its sweet and tart flavor. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its high antioxidant and flavonoid content, which have been shown to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Citrus × nobilis subf. keraji include reducing stress and anxiety, improving cardiovascular health, and boosting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Citrus × nobilis subf. keraji can be consumed as tea, juice, or oil, and are often used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, including fever, digestive issues, and skin problems.
